title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Thunderstorms are likely today for parts of NE Poland, S Poland, Slovakia, NE Hungary.

GNRL #1
NE Poland

weak thunderstorms to thunderstorms are expected during rain showers.
The main threats are:
- Small Hail
- Heavy Rain
- Non-convective wind gusts

GNRL #1
S Poland, Slovakia, NE Hungary

Thunderstorms during rain showers and also isolated ones are likely.
These thunderstorms could bring threats like:
- Hail
- Wind gusts
